title: Incorrect result when an index is used for an ordered join
poc: SELECT y FROM t1, t2 WHERE a=x AND b<=y ORDER BY b DESC;
SELECT y FROM t1, t2 WHERE a=x AND b<=y ORDER BY b DESC;
key_bug_features: Index usage alters results in ordered join queries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(b >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER, y TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
SELECT y FROM t1, t2 WHERE a = x AND b <= CAST(y AS INTEGER) ORDER BY b DESC;
